function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-02-08 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checks pass (attachment was read, single attachment ordering trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity, YAML subject safely quoted). Next finalize inbox processing by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task actions completed successfully: processed oldest inbox item, created outbox draft reply with verified invoice attachment, and deleted inbox file per workflow.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after successful processing.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a resend email draft to Nina with the requested 2026-02-08 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered lane, used inbox and email workflows before action, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, created outbound email in required outbox format, and deleted inbox item after completion per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request came from nina@finance-workflow.example, which matches Nina Schreiber's canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. The requested invoice details (issued_on 2026-02-08, counterparty Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) were confirmed in 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md. A compliant outbound draft was written and then the processed inbox file was deleted as required by workflow.
